title: Rename header from 'Strudel Bloom' to 'Bloom'
description: Simple branding change: the header should just say 'Bloom', not 'Strudel Bloom'. Cleaner, more distinct identity.

title: File System API auto-update: watch workspace files and auto-reload patterns on change
description: Add a feature to the workspace tab that watches the currently open pattern file (via File System API) and automatically reloads/re-evaluates when the file changes on disk. This enables the workflow where Claude Code (or any external editor) modifies the .strudel file and bloom immediately picks up the changes without manual refresh. Consider: polling interval vs native file watching (if available), visual indicator when file changes detected, toggle to enable/disable auto-update, debouncing rapid changes.
close_reason: Implemented: file watcher with polling, auto-update toggle in workspace tab, visual flash indicator, 6 passing tests

title: Hum-to-pattern: transcribe hummed melodies into Strudel code
description: Train an end-to-end multimodal model: audio in → Strudel code out. NOT fine-tuning Whisper for transcription, but feature extraction where the model learns the direct mapping. Training data created backwards: generate patterns, play them, hum/sing/beatbox along, pair (audio, pattern_code). Could use any multimodal model that accepts audio input.

title: World app: biome transitions with music crossfades
description: Gradual blending between zone types (forest→swamp→ocean). As you cross biome boundaries, the music crossfades rather than hard-cutting. Visual: terrain meshes interpolate, colors shift. Claude receives both 'leaving' and 'entering' biome context for smoother compositional transitions.

title: Bug: CPM not defined in headless mode
description:
Pattern that works in main REPL throws 'CPM is not defined' error in /headless mode. Likely a module loading issue - headless isn't loading all Strudel functions/modules that the main REPL loads. Check:
- What modules/prebake does main REPL load vs headless?
- Is BloomEngineContext properly initializing all Strudel functions?
- CPM and other globals need to be available in the evaluation context

title: Custom favicon: bloom/flower icon
description: Replace Strudel's alien favicon with a custom bloom/flower icon. Update favicon.ico and any PWA icons in website/public/.

title: Remove Ideas tab entirely
description: The Ideas tab is already hidden in the UI. Remove the underlying code completely to reduce bundle size and maintenance burden.

title: System tray app mode (Tauri)
description: Leverage the existing Tauri setup (src-tauri/) to create a system tray mode. App lives in menubar/system tray with minimal footprint. Click to expand full UI, or leave minimized for background playback. Could combine with headless mode for ultra-light background operation.

title: Memory profiling: identify heavy components
description: Profile Bloom's memory usage to identify what's consuming the most RAM. Goal: enable a lightweight background mode for file-watching scenarios where the full UI isn't needed.

title: Add 'Powered by Strudel' footer credit
description: Add a small 'Powered by Strudel' credit in the footer or bottom of the welcome tab. Acknowledges upstream while keeping Bloom branding prominent in the header.

title: Mini-app: Visualizer-only mode
description: A /visualizer route that renders fullscreen Hydra visuals with no code editor visible. Perfect for projection, performances, or ambient background. Syncs with pattern via file watcher. Minimal controls: maybe just a hidden menu on hover for switching patterns.

title: Mini-app: MIDI-style pad controller with AI suggestions
description: A /controller route that renders a CSS MIDI sequencer interface: twirly knobs that map to pattern parameters (tempo, filters, etc.), pad buttons for triggering sounds. Key feature: some buttons are AI-suggested directions ('add swing', 'darken the mood', 'double time'). Tapping a suggestion applies the change to the pattern file. Syncs with main editor via file watcher.

title: Experiment: GPT-4o Realtime API for audio-to-pattern
description: Test GPT-4o Realtime API for direct audio→Strudel pattern generation. Send hummed/sung audio, prompt model to output pattern code. Quick experiment before committing to custom model training. Goal: see if zero-shot or few-shot prompting can handle simple melodies.

title: Remove nudge feature
description: Remove the nudge functionality to reduce UI complexity

title: World app: creatures as melodic phrases
description: Wandering wireframe animals that carry melodic fragments. Each creature type has a distinct musical phrase. Following a creature gradually introduces its phrase into your composition. Fleeing from one fades it out. Creatures migrate between biomes, bringing musical ideas with them. Simple wireframe shapes: birds, deer, fish, etc.

title: World app: breadcrumb trail as compositional input
description: Show a fading line trail of where the player has walked. Claude uses the path shape as input: loops suggest repetition, zigzags suggest chaos, long straight lines suggest drone/sustain, circling back suggests recapitulation. The trail becomes a visual score.

title: World app: procedural weather system
description: Procedural weather that Claude factors into composition: rain = more reverb/wash, wind = filter sweeps/movement, storm = intensity/chaos, fog = low-pass/muted, clear = crisp/bright. Weather changes gradually as you walk. Simple wireframe visual cues (rain lines, wind particles).

title: Headless: query param configuration
description: Support URL query params for headless mode: /headless?autoplay=true&tempo=120&file=pattern.strudel. Enables bookmarkable/shareable headless setups and easy automation via URL.

title: World app: day/night cycle affects mood
description: Time passes as you walk (1 step = 1 minute?). Day/night cycle affects zone moods: forest at night = darker/more ambient, city at dawn = energetic buildup. Sun position shown as simple wireframe arc. Claude factors time-of-day into composition suggestions.

title: Shared File System component across mini-apps
description:
Create a reusable FileSystemPicker component that all mini-apps use consistently. Currently headless has its own 'open file' implementation. Goals:
- Single component for workspace/file selection
- Consistent UI across /headless, /controller, /world, etc.
- Investigate if File System API permissions persist across routes (if you authorize in /headless, does /controller inherit it?)
- If permissions don't persist, consider a shared permission state or prompt user once

title: Headless mode: minimal audio-only runtime
description: Create a separate /headless route that strips React UI entirely. Just the audio engine (Superdough) + File System API watcher + optional WebSocket for external control. Target use case: background playback mapped to a folder, controlled by external tools (Claude Code, MIDI, OSC). Dramatically lower memory footprint. Implementation: new Astro page at website/src/pages/headless.astro with minimal component that only mounts audio engine.

title: Mini-app navigation: swipe/arrows + hold-to-reveal menu
description:
Add navigation between mini-apps:
- Left/right arrow keys (or swipe on mobile) to flip between pages in sequence: /repl → /headless → /controller → /world → etc.
- Small dot indicator in bottom corner showing current position
- Hold the dot for 2 seconds to reveal a popup menu with direct links to all apps
- Keep it minimal and unobtrusive - the apps should feel standalone but connected

title: Mini-app: 3D wireframe world exploration (/world)
description:
A /world route with Three.js 3/4 view RPG-style map. DOS aesthetic: white wireframe meshes on black (forests, cities, mountains). As you walk around, Claude AI morphs the composition based on location vibes.

Key features:
- Place names overlaid on map act as 'zones' (chill, energetic, dark, etc.)
- Claude periodically reads your position/path and morphs the pattern
- Settings: update frequency (how often Claude pings), intensity (subtle vs drastic changes)
- Procedural infinite map: as you approach edges, AI generates new terrain in that direction
- Simple movement controls (arrow keys or WASD)

Visual ref: old wireframe tank games, Battlezone aesthetic

title: Architecture: multi-app ecosystem with shared engine
description: Core philosophy shift: Bloom is not one app but a library of standalone mini-apps (React routes) that share the same pattern engine and file watcher. Each app is a creative interface experiment. Agents should feel empowered to create new apps. Update AGENTS.md to reflect this: 'It's okay to create new routes as experimental interfaces. The pattern engine and file watcher are shared infrastructure.' Apps communicate via shared state/context or WebSocket. Examples: headless mode, MIDI controller, visualizer-only, teaching mode, etc.

title: Welcome tab splash gradient
description: Add a subtle flower-petal gradient or bloom-themed visual treatment to the welcome tab. Distinct visual identity without being garish.

title: World app: fog of war exploration
description: Unexplored areas hidden in darkness/fog. Map reveals as you walk - the act of exploration becomes part of the experience. Claude could factor in 'novelty' - walking into unexplored territory triggers more adventurous/unpredictable changes. Explored areas remain visible, creating a personal map of your musical journey.

title: Remove postcard feature
description: Strip out the postcard sharing functionality to simplify the UI
